properties.summary: Unidentifiable dark object moved silently against the wind at low altitude.
Brilliant orange light rose from behind the treeline and hovered for several minutes.
Flat metallic disk wobbled as it ascended and disappeared into the overcast sky.
Blinding flash occurred at low altitude followed by a brief glimpse of a dark object.
Sky flashed blue-white three times in rapid succession, no storm activity in the area.
Thin disc-shaped craft was observed darting between clouds at high speed.
Pulsating light appeared low on the horizon, changing colors from white to red to green.
Dark mass drifted slowly across the sky, occasionally obscuring stars behind it.
Rectangular dark object moved slowly across the sky, blocking out stars as it passed.
Multiple small spheres moved in a coordinated pattern before scattering in all directions.
Strange cross-shaped object glowed bright white and moved against the prevailing wind.
Triangular object with a bright light in the center hovered over the highway.
